ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient (e.g., Asian, African American, Hispanic) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient (e.g., Medicare, Medicaid, private) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the medical condition (e.g., cardiovascular, metabolic) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the medical condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment (e.g., medication, surgery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, therapy, surgery) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "administration_method" TEXT /* Method of administration (e.g., oral, injection, topical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date the condition started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition (e.g., active, inactive, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the treatment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedents" TEXT /* Antecedents of the association rule */,
  "consequents" TEXT /* Consequents of the association rule */,
  "support" REAL /* Support of the association rule */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the association rule */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift of the association rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date the patient dropped out of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., A1C level, blood pressure) */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "outcome_name")
)
